name: Easy Eastery Cut-Outs
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons shortening (NOT butter, margarine, oil, or vegetable oil spread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover bottom of 13x9-inch pan with heavy duty foil.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place chocolate chips and shortening. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, or until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Immediately spread the mixture evenly on the foil to about 1/8-inch thick; pat TINTED COCONUT evenly onto the chocolate.
3. Refrigerate for 5 to 10 minutes, or until beginning to firm. Press sturdy, Easter-shaped cookie cutters down into the foil, cutting through coconut and chocolate; do not remove the shapes. Return to refrigerator until completely firm; gently remove foil. Gently press out the shapes; cover and refrigerate until ready to use. Use as garnish for desserts. 6 to 12 cut-outs.
TINTED COCONUT:
In a small bowl, stir together 1/4 teaspoon water and 1 drop of food color. Stir in 1/2 cup MOUNDS Sweetened Coconut Flakes; with a fork, toss until evenly tinted.
